story.tasks: Task 1: Create production CD workflow file (AC: #1, #2) - Task 2: Configure build job (AC: #3 - build) - Task 3: Configure deploy job (AC: #3 - deploy) - Task 4: Configure deployment strategy (AC: #4, #5)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. `.github/workflows/cd-production.yml` oluşturulmuş - 2. Trigger: push tag (v*) - 3. Jobs: build (Docker image build, Tag: production-{version}, Push to container registry), deploy (Manual approval required, Deploy to production, Run migrations, Health check, Rollback on failure) - 4. Environment: production (protected) - 5. Deployment strategy: Blue-green or rolling (configurable)

doc.title: Epic 11: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want production'a tag-based deployment, So that versioned release'ler deploy edebilleyim. Acceptance Criteria: .github/workflows/cd-production.yml oluşturulmuş, Trigger: push tag (v*), Jobs: build (Docker image build, Tag: production-{version}), deploy (Manual approval required, Deploy to production, Run migrations, Health check, Rollback on failure)

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: Production deployment workflow using tag-based deployment (v1.0.0), manual approval via GitHub Environments, automatic rollback on failure, blue-green or rolling deployment strategy

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: Production workflow file, trigger: push tag v*, build and deploy jobs with Docker image build, production-{version} tagging, manual approval required, health check validation, rollback strategy

doc.title: Story 11.1: Production Dockerfile (Multi-Stage)
doc.snippet: Multi-stage Docker build optimization, node:20-alpine base image, non-root user execution, .dockerignore configuration, HEALTHCHECK instruction

doc.title: Story 11.2: CI Pipeline (GitHub Actions)
doc.snippet: Node.js 20 runtime, pull_request trigger, test jobs (lint, unit, integration, e2e), build verification, GitHub Actions workflow structure

doc.title: Story 11.3: CD Pipeline (Staging)
doc.snippet: GitHub Actions workflow with push to develop trigger, build job (Docker image build, staging-{sha} tagging), deploy job (SSH deployment, Prisma migrations, health checks, rollback), GitHub Environment configuration

code.reason: Provides /health endpoint for deployment validation in CD pipeline
Health check module for production monitoring
Reference implementation for GitHub Actions workflow structure, Node.js 20 setup, test execution
Reference for build and deploy job structure, Docker build, Prisma migration, health check validation, rollback mechanism
Multi-stage production build with node:20-alpine, used by CD pipeline for image creation
E2E test configuration referenced in CI pipeline
Jest test configuration for unit and integration tests in CI pipeline

story-context.constraints: - Must reuse GitHub Actions workflow structure from cd-staging.yml for consistency - Node.js 20 runtime required (consistent with CI and staging pipelines) - Must use existing docker/Dockerfile for multi-stage production build - Health check endpoint /health must be available for deployment validation - Prisma migration integration required (npx prisma migrate deploy) - Docker multi-stage build pattern: deps → build → production - Secrets management via GitHub Secrets (DOCKER_USERNAME, DOCKER_PASSWORD, PRODUCTION_SERVER_HOST) - Non-root user execution in containers - Semantic versioning (v1.0.0) for production releases - GitHub Environment protection required for production deployments - Manual approval gate for production deployments - Rollback mechanism using previous image tag - Environment variable validation via Joi (Story 10.3)

interface.name: GitHub Actions Workflow API
interface.signature: on: [push] with tags: ['v*']; jobs: build, deploy

tests.standards: Jest testing framework with unit, integration, and E2E test suites. Health check endpoints validated in tests. CI pipeline includes lint, unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, and build verification. GitHub Actions workflow files tested through CI/CD execution. Docker image health checks validated in container runtime.
tests.locations: src/**/__tests__/*.spec.ts for unit tests, test/**/*.e2e-spec.ts for E2E tests, .github/workflows/*.yml for CI/CD workflow validation
tests.ideas: Test 1: Verify cd-production.yml workflow file structure and trigger configuration (AC: #1, #2) - Test 2: Validate Docker image build and production-{version} tagging (AC: #3 - build) - Test 3: Test manual approval gate in GitHub Environments (AC: #3 - deploy) - Test 4: Verify Prisma migration execution in production deployment (AC: #3 - deploy) - Test 5: Validate health check endpoint /health is accessible post-deployment (AC: #3 - deploy) - Test 6: Test rollback mechanism using previous image tag (AC: #3 - deploy) - Test 7: Verify production environment protection rules (AC: #4) - Test 8: Test blue-green or rolling deployment strategy implementation (AC: #5)
